hero.badge: A new way to take orders
hero.titleLead: A web app with a menu for your
hero.lead: We build a digital menu for you in 1-2 days. Customers order straight from their phones, and you receive the orders in WhatsApp, Telegram or any other messenger.

features.title: Everything your restaurant needs
features.subtitle: A ready-made digital menu with support and updates. Start taking orders from day one.

items.title: Handy CRM and analytics
items.desc: See orders, customers, revenue and your most popular dishes. A simple admin panel for menu and prices.

items.title: Orders in your messenger
items.desc: Orders arrive straight to WhatsApp, Telegram or Viber. No POS terminal required.

items.title: Works on mobile
items.desc: Responsive design for any device. The customer opens the link and sees your menu.

items.title: 24/7 support
items.desc: We're always in touch. We help with setup, regularly ship updates and new features.

items.title: Launch in 1-2 days
items.desc: We build the initial site, upload your menu and connect a messenger. You start taking orders immediately.

items.title: Your brand
items.desc: Logo, colors, background — everything is customizable. Customers see your restaurant.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: We take care of everything. All you have to do is take the orders.

steps.title: Send a request
steps.desc: Fill in a short form — we'll get in touch within a day and walk through the details.

steps.title: We set everything up for you
steps.desc: We build the site, upload your menu with photos and descriptions, design the cover and restaurant card, and connect Telegram or WhatsApp for orders. Usually in 1-2 days.

steps.title: Start taking orders
steps.desc: Print the QR code for tables or share the link on social media. Orders arrive straight to your messenger, and you edit the menu and prices in a convenient admin panel.

demo.title: Here's what it looks like
demo.subtitle: This is how your customer sees the menu. Minimalist design and a few taps to place an order.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees and no percentage per order

plans.name: Starter
plans.desc: All the basic features of the web app

plans.name: Business
plans.desc: Priority development and early access to new features

plans.name: Business Max
plans.desc: The best value for a yearly subscription

cta.title: Ready to launch your digital menu?
cta.subtitle: Send a request and we'll set up the web app for your restaurant within 1-2 days.
cta.name: Your name

footer.brandDesc: Web apps with menus for restaurants. Orders delivered straight to your messenger.
